suppress.notes: file name: okio-jvm-2.10.0.jar sev: HIGH reason: This is a dependency of the release plugin in use and is not used in production where it would be vulnerable to the attack vector.

file name: h2-2.4.240.jar sev: MEDIUM reason: False positive. CVE-2018-14335 applies to H2 1.4.197 only. The backup function file read vulnerability was fixed in 1.4.198. Version 2.4.240 is not affected.
